title: Music : Backported
description:
Backports all the Newer Music to Older Versions! Now with the Chaos Cubed OST!
(Supports 1.8.9 to 1.21.6)
body:
![Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0920335104cb2937ba509c1d882e47e293f51355.png) 🎵 This Resource Pack does what it says, it **backports** all of The Newer Music to **Older Versions**! (_Formerly known as "1.21 Music Backport" and "Tunes : Backport"_) ☁️ **Now includes the new 26.2 Chaos Cubed OST!** 🌥️ ⚠️ **Notes** : - If the resource pack says "**Invalid, made for newer/older versions**", it'll still work as intended! - The supported latest Version will always be 1 Version below the latest one that has added new Music (Example : Supports 1.21.6 but not 1.21.7 due to the Lava Chicken Disc being added) - Due to the sheer amount of .ogg Music Files, the Resource Pack size is quite big in file size (Currently at 200MB+)
Included Music

    🔱 1.21 : Tricky Trials Tracks (added in Snapshot 24w18a) :
  • Featherfall - Aaron Cherof
  • Watcher - Aaron Cherof
  • Puzzlebox - Aaron Cherof
  • komorebi - Kumi Tanioka
  • pokopoko - Kumi Tanioka
  • yakusoku - Kumi Tanioka
  • Deeper - Lena Raine
  • Eld Unknown - Lena Raine
  • Endless - Lena Raine
  • [Music Disc] Creator - Lena Raine
  • [Music Disc] Creator (Music Box Version) - Lena Raine
  • [Music Disc] Precipice - Aaron Cherof

    • 🪂 1.21.6 : Chase the Skies Tracks (added in Snapshot 25w20a) :
  • Lilypad - Amos Roddy
  • Below and Above - Amos Roddy
  • O's Piano - Amos Roddy
  • Broken Clocks - Amos Roddy
  • Fireflies - Amos Roddy
  • [Music Disc] Tears - Amos Roddy

    • 🎵 1.21.7 Hotifx Track :
  • [Music Disc] Lava Chicken - Jack Black (Remixed by Hyper Potions)

    • 🧊 26.2 Chaos Cubed Tracks :
  • Memories - fingerspit
  • Home - fingerspit
  • Shores - fingerspit
  • Nightly - fingerspit
  • Ebb - fingerspit
  • [Music Disc] Bounce - fingerspit

    • ‼️These will play throughout your Gameplay, since they are listed under the "minecraft:music.game" category with the exception of Creator, Creator (Music Box Version), Precipice, Tears, and Lava Chicken, in which you need the Music Control Mod (or the /playsound command) to be able to Play.
## 📕Resource Pack's guides : **Recommended Mods :** - [https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification) | Displays what Music are being played at the start - [https://modrinth.com/mod/music-control](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-control) | Use to Control all of your Music in-game, including this Resource Pack's Music ⚠️ **These won't be needed for 1.21.6+ since Mojang added their own Music Notification and Music Frequency Support, but you should install them if you want full control over your Music!** ### ⬇️ Installation Guide : ### 1. Download this Resource Pack 2. Move it in to your "resourcepacks" Folder in your ".minecraft" Root Folder 3. Turn on the Resource Pack 4. Enjoy! ### ℹ️ Additional Guides (Mods, Tips) : ### Open your 'Esc' Menu Go to > 'Options' > 'Controls' > 'Key Binds' then Search "Open Music Screen". The Option for The "Music Control" Mod should be in here, Bind the Key to anything you want that doesn't Conflict with anything else. Go back and Press your Binded Key, it should open up the Music Control Menu, now you can change and play any Music in the Game you want! Video Demonstration : **You could also play the Music by the /playsound Command, Music that are in the "minecraft:music.game" can still be played normally throughout your gameplay!** ### ❕All the Music/Assets belongs to Mojang Studios and their respective owners/artists.
